summary: Bottle-based rejection testing complete. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - inspection form shows 'Crates Inspected' and 'Rejected Bottles' labels, stage balance shows correct units (crates for received/pending/passed, bottles for rejected), summary bar shows correct units, activity log shows 'X crates inspected, Y bottles rejected' format.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and integrations verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bottle-based rejection fully tested. Key changes from previous crate-based rejection: 1) InspectionRecord model no longer has qty_passed field - backend auto-sets qty_passed = qty_inspected (all crates pass through). 2) qty_rejected is now in BOTTLES, not crates. 3) Validation: qty_rejected cannot exceed qty_inspected * bottles_per_crate. 4) Frontend inspection form shows 'Crates Inspected' and 'Rejected Bottles' in two-column layout. 5) Stage balance row shows unit labels: crates for received/pending/passed, bottles for rejected. 6) Summary bar shows 'crates' under Unallocated/Delivery Ready, 'bottles' under Total Rejected. 7) Activity log shows 'X crates inspected, Y bottles rejected' format.

Backend_API_Tests.POST_inspect_new_format: PASSED - Accepts qty_inspected (crates) and qty_rejected (bottles), no qty_passed field
Backend_API_Tests.POST_inspect_validation_qty_rejected_neg: PASSED - Returns 400 'Rejected bottles cannot be negative'
Backend_API_Tests.POST_inspect_validation_max_bottles: PASSED - Returns 400 'Cannot reject more than X bottles (Y crates x Z)'
Backend_API_Tests.POST_inspect_rejected_bottles_tracked: PASSED - stage.rejected and total_rejected increase by qty_rejected
Backend_API_Tests.GET_batch_detail_units: PASSED - Returns correct structure with stage_balances

Frontend_UI_Tests.Inspection_form_max_bottles_helper: PASSED - Shows 'Max X bottles' helper text
Frontend_UI_Tests.Inspection_form_rejection_reason_conditi: PASSED - Rejection Reason field appears when rejected > 0
Frontend_UI_Tests.Inspection_submission: PASSED - Successfully submits and updates balances
Frontend_UI_Tests.Activity_log_format: PASSED - Shows 'X crates inspected, Y bottles rejected' format
